name: Holding Period Tacking for Tax-Free Exchanges

eligibility.description: Applies to property received in exchanges where the basis is determined by reference to the prior property (e.g., Sec 1033, 1091, 1042, 1045).

description: Allows taxpayers to 'tack' the holding period of a previously held asset onto a new asset received in a tax-free exchange (like an involuntary conversion or wash sale), helping meet the 1-year threshold for long-term capital gains.
